message:
test(e2e): add error recovery and retry flow tests

Implements brenner_bot-hgig with comprehensive E2E tests for:
- API retry on transient 502/503 failures with page reload
- Form validation recovery (empty form -> fix fields -> resubmit)
- Session page refresh controls for manual retry
- Session error state messaging
- Auth cookie expiry and re-authentication flow
- Partial data load recovery when some APIs fail
- Navigation chain stability after errors

All test scenarios include detailed withStep logging for debugging.
Network offline tests are skipped due to flakiness in CI.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
